/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/dft_processor_benchmark.dir/dft_processor_benchmark.cpp.o -o dft_processor_benchmark  ../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../../lib/phy/generic_functions/libocudu_dft.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfftw3f.so ../../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a
